artPrompt: A weathered elf druid volunteer fills the wide frame, caught mid-stride on a porch step with one hand raised to knock and bare leaf-stained feet planted in dewy grass, a blank wooden clipboard tucked under one arm and ivy threading her braided hair. Low golden afternoon light rakes across her earnest, tired face from a single source, deep shadow pooling behind. Rendered as a moody oil painting — old-master chiaroscuro, visible impasto brushwork, deep shadow, warm varnished tones.
name: Door-to-Door Druid
text: {T}: Add {G} or {W}. Spend this mana only to cast a spell or activate an ability that mentions a Voter, a recall, or a signature.
flavorText: She walks every block twice: once to knock, once because she forgot her shoes the first time.
